# Jenks Productions — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An events company based in Connecticut that hosts 16 live shows per year. The brand is centered around live entertainment experiences, with a consistent and active annual programming schedule.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover Connecticut&#39;s premier live events and entertainment company. From electrifying shows to unforgettable experiences, explore our 16 annual productions. Get ready to be amazed!

### Events
https://example.com/events
Browse an action-packed calendar of 16 annual live shows! Find the best entertainment events 2022 has to offer, from family fun to thrilling spectacles. Book your next great experience now.

### About
https://example.com/about
Meet the passionate team behind Connecticut&#39;s most consistent live entertainment series. Learn why our events &amp; entertainment brand is the go-to for thrilling, memorable experiences. Join our story!

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to elevate your next gathering? Contact Jenks Productions for top-tier entertainment for corporate events or private shows. Let&#39;s create an unforgettable live experience together!

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Jenks Productions
An events company based in Connecticut that hosts 16 live shows per year. The brand is centered around live entertainment experiences, with a consistent and active annual programming schedule.

## Target Audience
- Event Enthusiasts
- Corporate Event Planners
- Family Activity Seekers

## Industry
Events & Entertainment

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
